snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moŇĺete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak prińće o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" prińća o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaŇ°a ńćiji postupci se i dan danas preprińćavaju. Na ńćelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Ňĺestokih momaka sa naŇ°ih prostora, zańćetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaŇ°, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravińćan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reŇ°avao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anńĎeo ńćuvar dok je za ove druge bio nońána mora, a gnev i jańćinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odlińćno pamtili. ŇĹivotni put Ljubomira MagaŇ°a i druŇĺine koju je okupio oko sebe, moŇĺe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriŇĺnih deńćaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovńćega. Saznańáemo na koje sve skrivene i javne nańćine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogańĎaja iz njegovog Ňĺivota. ńĆuńáemo i svedońćanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristińćkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naŇ° sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

#dosije #masanlekic #PRVA

Ňěahika gelecekle ilgili planlarńĪnńĪ ilmek ilmek dokurken, Halit‚Äôi ve √ßocuklarńĪnńĪ avucunun i√ßine almńĪŇü, Halit‚Äôle evlilik hazńĪrlńĪklarńĪ i√ßindedir. YńĪldńĪz hamiledir ve bebeńüine bir zarar gelmemesi i√ßin hamilelik d√∂nemini herkesten uzakta bir k√∂yde ge√ßirmektedir. Bebeńüini sańülńĪkla d√ľnyaya getirmek ve b√ľt√ľn k√∂t√ľl√ľklerden uzak durmak tek amacńĪdńĪr. YńĪldńĪz‚ÄôńĪn aldńĪńüńĪ radikal karar, bir gece kapńĪsńĪnńĪn √ßalmasńĪyla deńüiŇüir. Ender ge√ßirdińüi kaza sonrasńĪ uzun s√ľre fel√ß kalmńĪŇü, zamanńĪnńĪ azimle iyileŇümeye ve ona zarar veren d√ľŇümanńĪndan intikam almaya adamńĪŇütńĪr. KarŇüńĪsńĪndaki d√ľŇümanńĪn g√ľc√ľyle tek baŇüńĪna baŇü edemeyeceńüini anladńĪńüńĪndan, kendine gelir gelmez YńĪldńĪz‚ÄôńĪn yanńĪna gider. Ender baŇüńĪna gelenleri YńĪldńĪz‚Äôa anlatńĪr ve bir zamanlarńĪn en b√ľy√ľk iki d√ľŇümanńĪ, Ňěahika ve arkasńĪndaki g√ľce karŇüńĪ iŇü birlińüi kararńĪ verirler.

snippet.title: Ka nje mesazh per ty - Bekimi i nenes! (28 Mars 2021)
snippet.description:
#EDielaShqiptare nga #ArditGjebrea prej vitit 2008 n√ę #TvKlan, programi m√ę popullor n√ę t√ę gjitha familjet shqiptare √ßdo t√ę diel√ę. Nj√ę program i cili p√ęrfshin nj√ę fash√ę orari maraton√ę, prej 6 or√ęsh transmetim.

Valentina nga Fieri ka ardhur n√ę rubrik√ęn ‚ÄúKa nj√ę mesazh p√ęr ty‚ÄĚ tek E Diela Shqiptare p√ęr t√ę rr√ęfyer marr√ędh√ęnien e ngusht√ę q√ę ka me djalin e saj t√ę madh Erionin dhe p√ęr ta surprizuar dit√ęn e tij t√ę dit√ęlindjes. Ajo ka rr√ęfyer se Erioni √ęsht√ę i fejuar dhe shum√ę shpejt do kaloj√ę n√ę nj√ę sht√ępi tjet√ęr me nusen, por Valentina nuk e pranon dot k√ęt√ę fakt sepse ka qen√ę shum√ę e lidhur me t√ę q√ę kur ai ishte shum√ę i vog√ęl.

Valentina: Vij nga Fieri dhe kam dy djem Erionin dhe Orgesin. Orgesi √ęsht√ę n√ę shkoll√ę n√ę Maqedoni. Kur ishte Erioni 8 vje√ß ne jetonim n√ę Berat,  p√ęr nj√ę jet√ę t√ę mir√ę ne u zhvendos√ęm n√ę Fier.

Ardit Gjebrea: Nd√ęrkoh√ę t‚Äôi vuaje nga migrena.

Valentina: √čsht√ę nj√ę problem q√ę do koh√ę t√ę rikuperosh veten. Ai e shikonte q√ę un√ę vuaja, nj√ę dit√ę m√ę gatuan makarona, ishte 10 vje√ß. Pas 3-4 or√ęsh m√ę ther√ęt, m√ę thot√ę mami ka gatuar edhe n√ę ato momente po g√ęzohesha, por pash√ę q√ę kishte djegur pak dor√ęn nuk e di se si u ndjeva, edhe n√ę faj. Pastaj filloi shkoll√ęn, filloi adoleshenca, im shoq emigroi drejt Greqis√ę, dhe ai filloi kujdeset m√ę shum√ę p√ęr mua, iu duk sikur po i binte atij pesha m√ę shum√ę. E fut√ęm n√ę sport t√ę q√ę aktivizohej. N√ę fund t√ę vitit t√ę par√ę filloi nj√ę pun√ę, si kamarier si t√ę gjith√ę t√ę rinjt√ę sot, rrog√ęn e dor√ęzonte t√ę gjith√ęn n√ę sht√ępi dhe mbaj mend q√ę rrog√ęn e par√ę m√ę ka blere nj√ę rrip ortopedik q√ę mos m√ę dhembte mesi sepse un√ę kisha nj√ę rrobaqep√ęsi dhe lodhesha shum√ę. Mbaroi shkoll√ęn e mesme dhe ne nuk kishim kushte p√ęr t√ę vazhduar shkoll√ęn e lart√ę dhe na ka ngelur peng e mua dhe tim shoqi.

Ardit Gjebrea: Vijm√ę pak tek nusja se jam shum√ę kureshtar, kur e njohu?

Valentina: Ai i kishte filluar ato njohjet e para dhe mua m√ę thot√ę q√ę kam nj√ę shoqe,nuk u shqet√ęsova fare sepse e dija q√ę dinte t‚Äôi hidhte mir√ę hapat. Ishte 18 p√ęr 19, ishte shum√ę i vog√ęl, por duke ditur q√ę n√ę at√ę mosh√ę dhe duhet nj√ę shoqe, e mendova q√ę ky f√ęmij√ę nuk do i hedh√ę kot hapat. Me shaka i thoja Eri nuk jam gati p√ęr vjehrr√ę, por zemra m√ę thoshte q√ę nuk i kishte hedhur hapat e gabuar. U r√ęndova pak sepse dihet dashuria e n√ęn√ęs dhe djalit, jo se isha xheloze, por‚Ä¶

Ardit Gjebrea: Sa vje√ß √ęsht√ę Erioni?

Ardit Gjebrea: Po mir√ę i madh √ęsht√ę p√ęr t√ę ikur nga sht√ępia.

Valentina: Kam b√ęr√ę nj√ę kompromis me veten time q√ę them se √ęsht√ę gati, por un√ę s‚Äôjam gati. Dua t‚Äôja jap bekimin tim q√ę t√ę vazhdoj√ę jet√ęn e tij. Zoti ta bekoj√ę dhe t‚Äôi jap√ę nj√ę familje t√ę lumtur ashtu si√ß ka dhe zemr√ęn.

Ardit Gjebrea: Ju jetoni akoma n√ę nj√ę sht√ępi apo jo? √áfar√ę thot√ę Erioni?

Valentina: Erioni ka nj√ę shprehje q√ę t√ę ma b√ęj√ę mua pak m√ę t√ę leht√ę ikjen. M√ę thot√ę he mami se qiraxhi jam.

Valentina ka ftuar t√ę birin sot n√ę studio p√ęr t‚Äôu uruar atij t√ę jet√ę i lumtur me nusen e vet√ę dhe t‚Äôi tregoj√ę se ia jep aprovimin t√ę jetoja n√ę nj√ę sht√ępi tjet√ęr me bashk√ęshorten sado t√ę v√ęshtir√ę e ka. /tvklan.al

#EDielaShqiptare nga #ArditGjebrea prej vitit 2008 n√ę #TvKlan, programi m√ę popullor n√ę t√ę gjitha familjet shqiptare √ßdo t√ę diel√ę. Nj√ę program i cili p√ęrfshin nj√ę fash√ę orari maraton√ę, prej 6 or√ęsh transmetim.

Ajo ka rr√ęfyer se Erioni √ęsht√ę i fejuar dhe shum√ę shpejt do kaloj√ę n√ę nj√ę sht√ępi tjet√ęr me nusen, por Valentina nuk e pranon dot k√ęt√ę fakt sepse ka qen√ę shum√ę e lidhur me t√ę q√ę kur ai ishte shum√ę i vog√ęl.

Valentina: Vij nga Fieri dhe kam dy djem Erionin dhe Orgesin. Orgesi √ęsht√ę n√ę shkoll√ę n√ę Maqedoni. Kur ishte Erioni 8 vje√ß ne jetonim n√ę Berat,  p√ęr nj√ę jet√ę t√ę mir√ę ne u zhvendos√ęm n√ę Fier.

Ardit Gjebrea: Nd√ęrkoh√ę t‚Äôi vuaje nga migrena.

Valentina: √čsht√ę nj√ę problem q√ę do koh√ę t√ę rikuperosh veten. Ai e shikonte q√ę un√ę vuaja, nj√ę dit√ę m√ę gatuan makarona, ishte 10 vje√ß. Pas 3-4 or√ęsh m√ę ther√ęt, m√ę thot√ę mami ka gatuar edhe n√ę ato momente po g√ęzohesha, por pash√ę q√ę kishte djegur pak dor√ęn nuk e di se si u ndjeva, edhe n√ę faj. Pastaj filloi shkoll√ęn, filloi adoleshenca, im shoq emigroi drejt Greqis√ę, dhe ai filloi kujdeset m√ę shum√ę p√ęr mua, iu duk sikur po i binte atij pesha m√ę shum√ę. E fut√ęm n√ę sport t√ę q√ę aktivizohej. N√ę fund t√ę vitit t√ę par√ę filloi nj√ę pun√ę, si kamarier si t√ę gjith√ę t√ę rinjt√ę sot, rrog√ęn e dor√ęzonte t√ę gjith√ęn n√ę sht√ępi dhe mbaj mend q√ę rrog√ęn e par√ę m√ę ka blere nj√ę rrip ortopedik q√ę mos m√ę dhembte mesi sepse un√ę kisha nj√ę rrobaqep√ęsi dhe lodhesha shum√ę. Mbaroi shkoll√ęn e mesme dhe ne nuk kishim kushte p√ęr t√ę vazhduar shkoll√ęn e lart√ę dhe na ka ngelur peng e mua dhe tim shoqi.

Ardit Gjebrea: Vijm√ę pak tek nusja se jam shum√ę kureshtar, kur e njohu?

Valentina: Ai i kishte filluar ato njohjet e para dhe mua m√ę thot√ę q√ę kam nj√ę shoqe,nuk u shqet√ęsova fare sepse e dija q√ę dinte t‚Äôi hidhte mir√ę hapat. Ishte 18 p√ęr 19, ishte shum√ę i vog√ęl, por duke ditur q√ę n√ę at√ę mosh√ę dhe duhet nj√ę shoqe, e mendova q√ę ky f√ęmij√ę nuk do i hedh√ę kot hapat. Me shaka i thoja Eri nuk jam gati p√ęr vjehrr√ę, por zemra m√ę thoshte q√ę nuk i kishte hedhur hapat e gabuar. U r√ęndova pak sepse dihet dashuria e n√ęn√ęs dhe djalit, jo se isha xheloze, por‚Ä¶

Ardit Gjebrea: Sa vje√ß √ęsht√ę Erioni?

Ardit Gjebrea: Po mir√ę i madh √ęsht√ę p√ęr t√ę ikur nga sht√ępia.

Valentina: Kam b√ęr√ę nj√ę kompromis me veten time q√ę them se √ęsht√ę gati, por un√ę s‚Äôjam gati. Dua t‚Äôja jap bekimin tim q√ę t√ę vazhdoj√ę jet√ęn e tij. Zoti ta bekoj√ę dhe t‚Äôi jap√ę nj√ę familje t√ę lumtur ashtu si√ß ka dhe zemr√ęn.

Ardit Gjebrea: E b√ęri ndarjen nga trungu familjar.

Ardit Gjebrea: Ju jetoni akoma n√ę nj√ę sht√ępi apo jo? √áfar√ę thot√ę Erioni?

Valentina: Erioni ka nj√ę shprehje q√ę t√ę ma b√ęj√ę mua pak m√ę t√ę leht√ę ikjen. M√ę thot√ę he mami se qiraxhi jam.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia‚Äč‚Äč

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-‚Äč‚Äč...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list‚Äč‚Äč...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list‚Äč‚Äč...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram‚Äč‚Äč
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook‚Äč‚Äč
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial‚Äč‚Äč
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter‚Äč‚Äč
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube‚Äč‚Äč

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äč #FutureNostalgia‚Äč #Grammys

snippet.title: Dollar Store Makeover
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am trying a bit of a new concept for my channel. I decided to go shopping at the Dollar Store for a couple of items that I thought would be fun to paint on, customize and decorate to make them more of my style. I noticed shopping at the Dollar Tree, that there were so many cute things that had a lot of easy DIY potential. I wanted to do this to show that you don't need to spend a lot to have fun with art and customizing things. There are so many cheap and affordable items to be painted on! This video starts out with a mini dollar tree haul, and then I go on to feature 3 different $1 makeovers. I hope I give you some fun ideas for easy dollar store flips!

Let me know if you want me to try this again or if you want me to try the "EXTREME MODE" (lol) dollar store makeover where I choose my art supplies from the dollar store as well.


PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

#YaTuzaksa

snippet.description:
UyanńĪŇü: B√ľy√ľk Sel√ßuklu 26.B√∂l√ľm √Ėzet:

Sencer‚Äôin tertibi neticesinde TekiŇü‚Äôin ihanetinden emin olan MelikŇüah, TekiŇü‚Äėe nasńĪl bir ceza verecektir? TahtńĪ ele ge√ßirmek i√ßin m√ľcadeleye girmiŇü olan TekiŇü, MelikŇüah‚ÄôńĪn elinden kurtulmayńĪ baŇüarabilecek midir?
√Ėte yandan Sabbah, KńĪnńĪk ObasńĪ‚Äôna gidip Tapar ile gizlice buluŇüan kadńĪnńĪn BaŇüulu olduńüunu √∂ńürenmiŇüti. DolayńĪsńĪyla Sel√ßuklu Devleti‚Äôni b√ľy√ľk bir karmaŇüaya s√ľr√ľkleyebilecek olan sńĪrra da vakńĪf olmayńĪ baŇüarmńĪŇütńĪ. Sabbah bu sńĪrrńĪ nasńĪl kullanacaktńĪr?
KńĪnńĪk ObasńĪ‚Äėnda Efruz‚Äôu tanńĪyacak olan Livya, Efruz ile Sabbah‚ÄôńĪ ele verecek midir? Efruz, Sabbah ile birlikte KńĪnńĪk ObasńĪ‚Äėndan ka√ßmayńĪ baŇüarabilecek midir?
T√ľm bunlarńĪn yanńĪ sńĪra; Terken, karnńĪndaki bebeńüin erkek olduńüunu √∂ńürenmiŇü, vakit kaybetmeden bu g√ľzel haberle MelikŇüah‚ÄôńĪ m√ľjdelemiŇüti. Terken dońüuracak olduńüu erkek bebeńüi kullanarak saraydaki dengeleri deńüiŇütirebilecek midir?
Dińüer taraftan Sel√ßuklu‚Äônun takvim √ßalńĪŇümalarńĪndan haberdar olan FatńĪmi Veziri Bedr√ľlcemali, Sel√ßuklu‚Äônun ńįslam √ālemi‚Äônde giderek parlayan yńĪldńĪzńĪnńĪ karartmak adńĪna Hasan Sabbah‚Äôtan bu takvimi istemiŇüti. Bunun √ľzerine Sabbah‚ÄôńĪn rasathanedeki gizli refiki Fida harekete ge√ßmiŇü, √Ėmer Hayyam‚ÄôńĪn kendine olan g√ľvenini hi√ße sayarak; √Ėmer Hayyam‚ÄôńĪ ańüńĪr yaralamńĪŇü ve takvimi ka√ßńĪrmayńĪ baŇüarmńĪŇütńĪ.
√áalńĪnan takvim meselesinin a√ßńĪńüa kavuŇüturulmasńĪ i√ßin bizzat √ßalńĪŇüacak olan Nizam√ľlm√ľlk, Fida‚ÄônńĪn ihanetini nasńĪl deŇüifre edecektir? Nizam√ľlm√ľlk, bu takvim √ľzerinden Becr√ľlcemali ve Sabbah‚Äôa ulaŇümayńĪ baŇüarabilecek midir?

snippet.title: Ka nje mesazh per ty - Premtimi i Selimit! (28 Mars 2021)
snippet.description:
#EDielaShqiptare nga #ArditGjebrea prej vitit 2008 n√ę #TvKlan, programi m√ę popullor n√ę t√ę gjitha familjet shqiptare √ßdo t√ę diel√ę. Nj√ę program i cili p√ęrfshin nj√ę fash√ę orari maraton√ę, prej 6 or√ęsh transmetim.

Pjes√ę e rubrik√ęs ‚ÄúKa nj√ę mesazh p√ęr ty‚ÄĚ tek e Diela Shqipare √ęsht√ę b√ęr√ę Selimi i cili ka rr√ęfyer historin√ę e jet√ęs s√ę tij dhe si √ęsht√ę njohur me bashk√ęshorten q√ę ai ka sot.

Selimi: Kam ftuar nusen time Filloreta. Para 17 vitesh un√ę humba n√ęn√ęn time dhe n√ę at√ę koh√ę un√ę isha ushtar. At√ę moment e p√ęrjetova shume keq dhe sjellja ime filloi t√ę mos ishte e rregullt. Fillova t√ę zihesha me njer√ęzit, s‚Äôdoja t√ę shihja njer√ęz me sy, b√ęja sherre t√ę kota dhe k√ęshtu vazhdoi, m√ę ndryshoi komplet si njeri.

Ardit Gjebrea: Por dikush e ndryshoi karakterin t√ęnd p√ęrs√ęri.

Selimi: Mua m√ę doli nj√ę variant p√ęr n√ę Itali p√ęr 3 muaj, shkova atje punova dhe kur u ktheva ishte momenti q√ę takova nj√ę vajz√ę n√ę Durr√ęs tek tregu i rrobave, e ndoqa nga pas, ajo ishte me babain e saj. Mua m√ę p√ęlqeu edhe shkova nga mbrapa, e shoq√ęrova deri tek lagjia e vet√ę derisa i m√ęsova dhe sht√ępin√ę. Ajo m√ę pa dhe m√ę ndiqte me sy. Kur ishte n√ę autobus q√ę po shkonte tek sht√ępia, i b√ęra nj√ę shenj√ę i thash√ę t√ę pres tek rruga prap√ę se un√ę nuk t√ę vij tek sht√ępia. Ajo m√ę tha ok por nuk isha e sigurt n√ęse do dilte. Zbrit√ęm nga autobusi, ajo iku me t√ę atin, e shoq√ęroi deri n√ę sht√ępi dhe pas 10 minutash doli, kemi shkuar tek nj√ę kafe aty pran√ę, kemi biseduar, kemi ndenjur af√ęr 3 or√ę. I treguam p√ęr nj√ęri-tjetrin, ajo mi tregoi t√ę gjitha, por un√ę jo √ßdo gj√ę. P√ęr humbjen e mamas√ę nuk i tregova, mendova se ishte her√ęt, t√ę shikonim nj√ę her√ę si do vinin pun√ęt.

Aty shk√ęmbyem numrat e telefonit dhe q√ę asaj dite ne vazhduam t√ę flisnim n√ę telefon. Kur e takova at√ę, v√ęllai i saj i vog√ęl nga kishte par√ę bashk√ę dhe me vrap tek sht√ępia i kishte th√ęn√ę t√ę atit. Kur vajti tek sht√ępia i thot√ę i ati kush ishte ai √ßun dhe kjo i tha q√ę g√ęnjen ai se √ęsht√ę i vog√ęl. M√ę von√ę n√ę dark√ę i kishte th√ęn√ę q√ę o babi √ęsht√ę e v√ęrtet√ę, jo se kemi gj√ę serioze, nuk e di tani t√ę shohim. Ai tha q√ę n√ęse √ęsht√ę gj√ę serioze t√ę pakt√ęn t√ę vij√ę q√ę ta njoh un√ę si djal√ę. Un√ę i thash√ę q√ę √ęsht√ę shum√ę her√ęt. Ika s√ęrish n√ę Itali, por s‚Äôm√ę zinte vendi thash√ę do iki t√ę fejohem, s‚Äôka m√ę. Pasi erdha nga Italia, fola me gjyshen time i thash√ę kam njohur nj√ę vajz√ę do shkojm√ę t‚Äôja k√ęrkojm√ę dor√ęn dhe kjo i thot√ę babait tim dhe gjith√ę nat√ęn kan√ę q√ęndruar pa gjum√ę, si do shkojm√ę, si do na presin. Shkojm√ę dhe pa q√ę ishin mbledhur t√ę gjith√ę dhe aty u √ßlirua pak se ishte n√ę tension.

Selimi tregon se prind√ęrit ran√ę dakort me fejes√ęn ton√ę. Pasi u martuan ai filloi prap√ę t√ę sillej keq, t√ę zihej me njer√ęzit, tek puna q√ę ishte nuk rrinte edhe fjala m√ę e vog√ęl q√ę i thoshin, i dukej sikur e ofendonin, por bashk√ęshortja i ka q√ęndruar gjithmon√ę pran√ę dhe e ka mb√ęshtetur. Ata jan√ę b√ęr√ę edhe prind√ęr t√ę 3 f√ęmij√ęve.

Selimi rr√ęfen se para 3 muajsh asaj i ka humbur babai dhe e ka p√ęrjetuar shum√ę keq sepse ishte shum√ę e lidhur me t√ę. Ai ka marr√ę nj√ę ofert√ę pune nga burri i motr√ęs s√ę tij p√ęr t√ę ikur n√ę Itali, por ajo nuk d√ęshiron q√ę t√ę rrij√ę vet√ęm me 3 f√ęmij√ę. Ai vjen sot n√ę studio p√ęr t‚Äôi th√ęn√ę q√ę edhe n√ęse kontrata e pun√ęs do i dal√ę, ai nuk do shkoj√ę, do e anuloj√ę. /tvklan.al

snippet.description:

It‚Äôs Saturday morning, so you know what time it is‚Ä¶ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

We‚Äôve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing who‚Äôs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think it‚Äôll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the Lambo‚Äôs bonnet, you‚Äôll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But that‚Äôs not all‚Ä¶ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

snippet.title: Ka nje mesazh per ty - Marina Vjollca surprizon Vilsonin! (21 Mars 2021)
snippet.description:
#EDielaShqiptare nga #ArditGjebrea prej vitit 2008 n√ę #TvKlan, programi m√ę popullor n√ę t√ę gjitha familjet shqiptare √ßdo t√ę diel√ę. Nj√ę program i cili p√ęrfshin nj√ę fash√ę orari maraton√ę, prej 6 or√ęsh transmetim. #MarinaVjollca

Nj√ę baba i quajtur Ilirjan ka ardhur n√ę rubrik√ęn ‚ÄúKa nj√ę mesazh p√ęr ty‚ÄĚ tek E Diela Shqiptare p√ęr t‚Äôi b√ęr√ę nj√ę surpriz√ę djalit t√ę tij Vilsonit i cili √ęsht√ę me sindrom√ęn down. Ilirjani ka treguar se Vilsoni p√ęlqen shum√ę spektaklin e humorit ‚ÄúKlanifornia‚ÄĚ ku transmetohet √ßdo t√ę shtun√ę n√ę Tv Klan dhe adhuron Marina Vjollc√ęn. P√ęr k√ęt√ę p√ęlqim t√ę madh q√ę ka ndaj moderatores, Ardit Gjebrea e ka ftuar at√ę p√ęr t‚Äôi b√ęr√ę nj√ę surpriz√ę 11-vje√ßarit.

I pyetur nga Arditi se √ßfar√ę p√ęlqen tek Marina, Vilsoni shprehet se i p√ęlqen shum√ę veshja dhe shal√ęt. Kjo deklarat√ę e djalit ka shkaktuar t√ę qeshura t√ę m√ędha n√ę studio.

Ardit Gjebrea: Po Vilsonit √ßfar√ę i p√ęlqen?

Ilirjani: Klanifornia, i shikon dhe ka qejf t‚Äôi imitoj√ę.

Ardit Gjebrea: Ka ndonj√ę t√ę preferuar nga Klanifornia?

Ilirjani: Prezantuesen, Marin√ęn. I p√ęlqen se i prezanton humorist√ęt dhe luan rolin e Hyremit.

Ardit Gjebrea: √áfar√ę ndodh kur ju ia ndryshoni kanalin kur √ęsht√ę Marina n√ę ekran?

Ilirjani: M√ęrzitet, thot√ę t‚Äôi mos e shiko, e shikoj un√ę.

Moderatori Ardit Gjebrea i tregon se mbrapa ekranit ndodhet Marina Vjollca dhe lumturohet pa mas√ę. Moderatorja i shkon pran√ę dhe Ilirjani emocionohet. Pasi Vilsoni hyn n√ę studio, moderatori Ardit Gjebrea i b√ęn disa pyetje dhe ai i p√ęrgjigjet t√ę gjithave pa asnj√ę problem.

Ardit Gjebrea: √áfar√ę t√ę p√ęlqen nga Tv Klan?

Vilsoni: T√ę Panjohurit.

Ardit Gjebrea: Po tjet√ęr?

Vilsoni: Edhe Power Kids.

Ardit Gjebrea: Vilson ti qenk√ę i papar√ę, ti i dike shum√ę mir√ę programet t√ę E Diela Shqiptare.

Vilsoni: I di.

Ardit Gjebrea: Po tjet√ęr n√ę Tv Klan, √ßfar√ę shikon ti?

Vilsoni: Marin√ęn, e kam qejf.

Ardit Gjebrea: Ku del Marina?

Vilsoni: Tek Klanifornia.

Ardit Gjebrea: Vilson je shum√ę i madh, e nise nj√ę her√ę me qokat p√ęr E Diela Shqiptare dhe pastaj vajte ku t√ę p√ęlqen vet√ę. Po p√ęr √ßfar√ę t√ę p√ęlqen Marina ty?

Vilsoni: Nga veshja dhe nga shalat.

Ardit Gjebrea: Si mo, nga shalat?

Vilsoni: Po.

Ardit Gjebrea: (Qesh). Po ku mo se ajo del gjithmon√ę e mbuluar, ku e shikon?

Vilsoni: E shikoj.

Ardit Gjebrea: Po m√ęnyra se si prezanton?

Vilsoni: Bukur.

Ardit Gjebrea: Po men√ßuria e saj t√ę p√ęlqen?

Vilsoni: Po.

Ardit Gjebrea: I ka gjith√ę t√ę mirat?

Vilsoni: I ka t√ę mira shum√ę.

Ardit Gjebrea: Po ndonj√ę v√ęrejtje ke p√ęr Marin√ęn?

Vilsoni: I kam. T√ę rregulloj√ę sken√ęn.

Ardit Gjebrea: Pse? Ta pyesim n√ęse do t√ę vij√ę tek E Diela Shqiptare?

Vilsoni: Po le t√ę vij√ę.

Ardit Gjebrea: Ti m√ę shum√ę e do Marin√ęn tek Klanifornia apo t√ę vij√ę me mua tek E Diela Shqiptare?

Vilsoni: Tek Klanifornia. /tvklan.al

snippet.title: AkńĪncńĪ 13. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
13.B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti:
Nergis son anda AkńĪncńĪ'nńĪn m√ľdahalesiyle K√∂ksal'ńĪn tuzańüńĪndan kurtulur. Bu tuzańüńĪ ona kuranlar kimlerdir? ńįstanbul'da ise yeni ve √ßok g√ľ√ßl√ľ bir savaŇü√ßńĪ Ňüehrin altńĪnńĪ √ľst√ľne getirmeye baŇülamńĪŇütńĪr. Kor-Han! Cevdet ise Londra'dan d√∂nd√ľńü√ľnde Nergis'e yapńĪlan saldńĪrńĪyńĪ araŇütńĪrmaya baŇülar. Nergis'e bu tuzańüńĪ kuran Aylin ve K√∂ksal ise Cevdet'in kendilerine yaklaŇümamasńĪ i√ßin harekete ge√ßer. Cevdet, Gizli YapńĪ'nńĪn b√ľt√ľn adamlarńĪnńĪn √∂ld√ľr√ľld√ľńü√ľn√ľ √∂ńürenir. Bu iŇüin arkasńĪnda AcńĪ Getirenler'in olduńüunu bilmemektedir. Onu √ßok daha k√∂t√ľ bir s√ľrpriz beklemektedir. Kor-Han ise AkńĪncńĪ'yńĪ t√ľm √ľlke √∂n√ľnde √∂l√ľmc√ľl bir savaŇüa davet eder. AkńĪncńĪ hayatńĪnda karŇüńĪlaŇütńĪńüńĪ en g√ľ√ßl√ľ d√ľŇüman karŇüńĪsńĪnda ne yapacaktńĪr?  Abone Olmak ńį√ßin; https://bit.ly/35q6dOx

BaŇürollerini Ňě√ľkr√ľ √ĖzyńĪldńĪz ve B√ľŇüra Develi'nin paylaŇütńĪńüńĪ, YńĪldńĪray Ňěahinler (Cevdet Emirońülu), Tolga Tekin (Orhan), Erkan BektaŇü (Kemal), Sermet YeŇüil (K√∂ksal), Didem ńįnselel (Aylin Emirońülu), YńĪlmaz Bayraktar (C√ľneyt), M√ľge Boz (Beste), Serhan Onat (YańüńĪz Emirońülu), Ay√ßa Erturan (Filiz), Berrin ArńĪsoy (Meryem Aktolga), Berrak KuŇü (Hacer), Atakan HoŇüg√∂ren (Murat Aktolga), SavaŇü Alp BaŇüar (Taner), Erc√ľ Turan (Lukas), Selin √áuhadarońülu (Beyza Aktolga), Deren Talu (Didem Emirońülu), Jasmine Simin BerkiŇü (Yańümur), √Ėyk√ľ Su Okur (Duygu), Bilgi AydońümuŇü (Yeliz), Arda YeŇüillik√ßi (Emre), Efe SorarlńĪ (Ozan), Can Kulan (Y√ľcel), Kaan Alakent (Efe), Serena Yapa√∂z (√Ėzlem), Duygu Kum (Pervin), Bur√ß K√ľmbetliońülu (Tahsin) gibi isimlerin oynadńĪńüńĪ AkńĪncńĪ; Ňüehrini ve insanlarńĪnńĪ canńĪ pahasńĪna koruyan bir kahramanńĪn hikayesini ekrana taŇüńĪyor.

Cevdet ise Londra'dan d√∂nd√ľńü√ľnde Nergis'e yapńĪlan saldńĪrńĪyńĪ araŇütńĪrmaya baŇülar. Nergis'e bu tuzańüńĪ kuran Aylin ve K√∂ksal ise Cevdet'in kendilerine yaklaŇümamasńĪ i√ßin harekete ge√ßer. Cevdet, Gizli YapńĪ'nńĪn b√ľt√ľn adamlarńĪnńĪn √∂ld√ľr√ľld√ľńü√ľn√ľ √∂ńürenir. Bu iŇüin arkasńĪnda AcńĪ Getirenler'in olduńüunu bilmemektedir. Onu √ßok daha k√∂t√ľ bir s√ľrpriz beklemektedir. Kor-Han ise AkńĪncńĪ'yńĪ t√ľm √ľlke √∂n√ľnde √∂l√ľmc√ľl bir savaŇüa davet eder. AkńĪncńĪ hayatńĪnda karŇüńĪlaŇütńĪńüńĪ en g√ľ√ßl√ľ d√ľŇüman karŇüńĪsńĪnda ne yapacaktńĪr?  Abone Olmak ńį√ßin; https://bit.ly/35q6dOx

BaŇürollerini Ňě√ľkr√ľ √ĖzyńĪldńĪz ve B√ľŇüra Develi'nin paylaŇütńĪńüńĪ, YńĪldńĪray Ňěahinler (Cevdet Emirońülu), Tolga Tekin (Orhan), Erkan BektaŇü (Kemal), Sermet YeŇüil (K√∂ksal), Didem ńįnselel (Aylin Emirońülu), YńĪlmaz Bayraktar (C√ľneyt), M√ľge Boz (Beste), Serhan Onat (YańüńĪz Emirońülu), Ay√ßa Erturan (Filiz), Berrin ArńĪsoy (Meryem Aktolga), Berrak KuŇü (Hacer), Atakan HoŇüg√∂ren (Murat Aktolga), SavaŇü Alp BaŇüar (Taner), Erc√ľ Turan (Lukas), Selin √áuhadarońülu (Beyza Aktolga), Deren Talu (Didem Emirońülu), Jasmine Simin BerkiŇü (Yańümur), √Ėyk√ľ Su Okur (Duygu), Bilgi AydońümuŇü (Yeliz), Arda YeŇüillik√ßi (Emre), Efe SorarlńĪ (Ozan), Can Kulan (Y√ľcel), Kaan Alakent (Efe), Serena Yapa√∂z (√Ėzlem), Duygu Kum (Pervin), Bur√ß K√ľmbetliońülu (Tahsin) gibi isimlerin oynadńĪńüńĪ AkńĪncńĪ; Ňüehrini ve insanlarńĪnńĪ canńĪ pahasńĪna koruyan bir kahramanńĪn hikayesini ekrana taŇüńĪyor.

snippet.description:
50.B√∂l√ľm:

NńįKOLA, FLATYOS‚ÄôUN ńįNTńįKAMI ńį√áńįN YEMńįN EDńįYOR

Kara Ňěaman Togay‚ÄôńĪn, Malhun Hatun‚Äôu yaralayarak Osman Bey‚Äôe meydan okumasńĪnńĪn ardńĪndan; Konstantiniyye‚Äôden yeni birliklerle d√∂nen Nikola, Flatyos‚Äôun intikamńĪnńĪ almak i√ßin yemin eder. Flatyos‚Äôun anńĪsńĪnńĪ yaŇüatmak i√ßin savaŇü√ßńĪ kimlińüine b√ľr√ľnen ve gladyat√∂r kost√ľm√ľ giyen Nikola, Papa‚ÄônńĪn ajanlarńĪ S√ľleyman ve Melik aracńĪlńĪńüńĪyla Togay‚Äôla bir araya gelir. ńįkili ittifak kararńĪ alńĪrken hedefine S√∂ńü√ľt‚Äô√ľ koyar! 

OSMAN BEY HERKESńį ŇěAŇěIRTIYOR

Osman Bey, D√ľndar Bey‚Äôin kendine temize √ßńĪkarmasńĪnńĪn ardńĪndan obadaki haini bulmak i√ßin yeni yollar ararken; Cerkutay‚ÄôńĪn beklenmedik ihaneti herkesi ŇüaŇükńĪna √ßevirir. Malhun Hatun, intikam almak isterken bir kez daha Togay‚ÄôńĪn eline d√ľŇüer. Osman Bey ise kendisine kurulan ittifaka karŇüńĪlńĪk zekice planńĪyla herkesi ters k√∂Ňüeye yatńĪracaktńĪr. 

BńįZANS-MOńěOL ńįTTńįFAKI DENGELERńį NASIL DEńěńįŇěTńįRECEK?

Osman Bey, Bizans-Mońüol ittifakńĪna karŇüńĪ nasńĪl bir strateji geliŇütirecek? Nikola ve Togay‚ÄôńĪn anlaŇümasńĪ u√ß b√∂lgesinin kaderini nasńĪl deńüiŇütirecek? Konstantiniyye‚Äôden yeni birliklerle d√∂nen Nikola‚ÄônńĪn asńĪl planńĪ ne? Noyan‚ÄôńĪn ońülu olduńüu ortaya √ßńĪkan Kara Ňěaman Togay, Osman Bey‚Äôi alt edebilmek i√ßin ne yapacak? Kendini temize √ßńĪkaran D√ľndar Bey‚Äôin posta oturmak i√ßin planńĪ ne? Togay‚ÄôńĪn eline d√ľŇüen Malhun Hatun‚Äôun akńĪbeti ne olacak? Cerkutay‚ÄôńĪn ihanetinin arkasńĪnda ne var? Osman Bey, T√ľrk obalarńĪnńĪ birleŇütirme hedefinde baŇüarńĪlńĪ olabilecek mi? 

O, k√∂m√ľr karasńĪ g√∂zleriyle, gaza ve h√ľrriyet ateŇüini tutuŇüturacaktńĪ. 

AdńĪ, Ertuńürul Gazi ońülu Osman‚ÄôdńĪ‚Ä¶ 

KaranlńĪńüńĪn i√ßinde ona yol g√∂steren ‚ÄúaŇük‚ÄĚ oldu‚Ä¶

Kan ve g√∂zyaŇüńĪyla sulanan topraklarda, g√∂k ekini gibi bi√ßilen; yedi g√∂ńü√ľ, yedi yeri, dańülarńĪ, denizleri aŇüacak bir milletin r√ľyasńĪnńĪ ‚ÄúaŇükla‚ÄĚ g√∂rd√ľ.

G√ľc√ľn√ľ kńĪlńĪcńĪndan deńüil, ‚ÄúaŇüktan‚ÄĚ aldńĪ‚Ä¶ ZorbalńĪńüa adaletle; k√∂lelińüe h√ľrriyetle direnen, tarihin g√∂rd√ľńü√ľ en b√ľy√ľk imparatorluńüa adńĪnńĪ ‚ÄúaŇükla‚ÄĚ verdi.

72 milleti kńĪran bozuk d√ľzene karŇüńĪ baŇükaldńĪrńĪ, mazlumlarńĪn sessiz √ßńĪńülńĪńüńĪna umut, KuruluŇü‚Äôun adńĪ oldu‚Ä¶

KuruluŇü Osman‚Ä¶ 400 √ßadńĪrlńĪk bir obadan, ‚Äúilahi aŇükla‚ÄĚ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluńüuna y√ľr√ľy√ľŇü√ľn hikayesi.

snippet.title: Emanet 146. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 146 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

en.title: MaraŇülńĪ Episode 9
en.description:
MaraŇülńĪ Episode 9 - Summary:
MaraŇülńĪ hears that SavaŇü detains ńįlhan. MaraŇülńĪ interrogates Ozan and learns that SavaŇü has taken over the company. ńįlhan learns about the dirty work that he will transport by plane from SavaŇü. Will MaraŇülńĪ help ńįlhan, who is now in trouble? Mahur does not go abroad and confesses her love to MaraŇülńĪ. How will this confession affect the relationship between the two? Aziz learns that Mahur did not get on the plane. Firuzan opens up the subject of love again, but this time Aziz is also very suspicious. Aziz, who blames MaraŇülńĪ for what happened, cannot persuade Mahur, with whom he is at odds, to return home. Will Mahur be able to forgive her father? Will Aziz learn about the love between MaraŇülńĪ and Mahur? Necati asks Aziz, 'Why don't you tell that I was the one who killed √Ėmer?'. Aziz, who does not tell this truth to the household, wants to protect Necati by keeping him out of all things. Will the father and son make it up? MaraŇülńĪ learns about the dirty work of SavaŇü and sends a note to SavaŇü. SavaŇü delivers MaraŇülńĪ's note to his partner, whom he meets at the cemetery. Who is the partner of SavaŇü? Will MaraŇülńĪ reveal the identity of SavaŇü's partner?

Selim ve Sel√ßuk TaŇükńĪn‚Äôa kirli iŇülere bulaŇümayacańüńĪna dair s√∂z verir ve Soner ve Eray‚Äôla ortak olduńüu mek√ĘnńĪ canlandńĪrmaya karar verir. ńįstanbul‚Äôdan tanńĪdńĪńüńĪ s√ľrpriz bir sanat√ßńĪyla irtibata ge√ßer ve onu mek√ĘnlarńĪnda konser vermesi i√ßin ikna eder. Yańümur, Akg√ľn‚Äô√ľn baŇüńĪ beladan kurtulduńüu i√ßin √ßok mutludur. BabasńĪnńĪn √ľst√ľ kapalńĪ bir Ňüekilde yaptńĪńüńĪ, Akg√ľn‚Äôden uzak durmasńĪ y√∂n√ľndeki uyarńĪlarńĪ ciddiye almaya pek niyeti yoktur. Dińüer taraftan Akg√ľn, Selim‚Äôle aynńĪ √ßatńĪ altńĪnda yaŇüarken, Yańümur‚Äôa yaklaŇüamayacańüńĪnńĪ bilir ancak kendisine h√Ękim olmakta zorlanńĪr. Akg√ľn, aŇükńĪna karŇüńĪ koyamayacańüńĪnńĪ anladńĪńüńĪnda ciddi bir karar almasńĪ gerekecektir. Selim ise Akg√ľn‚Äôle yaptńĪńüńĪ operasyonun detaylarńĪnńĪ saklayarak, katil zanlńĪsńĪ Cemal‚Äôi yakalar. Selim‚Äôin hikayesindeki boŇüluklar, inandńĪrńĪcńĪlńĪńüńĪnńĪ sorgulatńĪr ve s√ľregelen soruŇümasńĪ kapsamńĪnda bu olayńĪ da araŇütńĪrmasńĪ i√ßin bir muhakkik atanńĪr. Canan, Selim‚Äôin baŇüńĪnńĪn bu sefer ger√ßekten derde girdińüinden emindir ve bunu durdurmak i√ßin harekete ge√ßer.


ńįdealist Cumhuriyet SavcńĪsńĪ Selim Kara (Ali Atay), 8 yńĪl √∂nce hapse yolladńĪńüńĪ organize su√ß lideri Sel√ßuk TaŇükńĪn‚Äôdan (Arif PiŇükin) reddedemeyeceńüi bir teklif alńĪr. Sel√ßuk TaŇükńĪn, SavcńĪ Selim Kara‚ÄônńĪn b√ľt√ľn su√ß √∂rg√ľt√ľn√ľ √ß√∂kertecek davasńĪnda, tanńĪklńĪk yapmayńĪ istemektedir. Ancak bunun i√ßin tek bir ŇüartńĪ vardńĪr; ońülu Akg√ľn G√∂kalp TaŇükńĪn‚ÄôńĪ (Alperen Duymaz) Selim Kara‚ÄônńĪn bizzat korumasńĪ‚Ä¶ Su√ß d√ľnyasńĪ i√ßinde b√ľy√ľm√ľŇü, tehlikeli ve sorunlu g√∂r√ľn√ľm√ľn√ľn ardńĪnda duygusal bir gen√ß olan Akg√ľn i√ßin bu kabul edilmesi g√ľ√ß bir durumdur. Hayat beklemedińüi bir yerden daha sńĪnar Selim‚Äôi; ńįzmir‚Äôde √ßocuklarńĪ ile yaŇüayan eŇüi Canan (Funda Eryińüit) boŇüanmak istemektedir. Ailesi ile iŇüi arasńĪnda kalan SavcńĪ Kara, baŇü belasńĪ olarak g√∂rd√ľńü√ľ Akg√ľn‚Äô√ľ ailesinin yanńĪna ńįzmir √áeŇüme‚Äôde bulunan Adalet Sitesi‚Äône g√∂t√ľrmek zorunda kalńĪr. Selim‚Äôin beklenmeyen misafiri Akg√ľn‚Äô√ľn geliŇüi site sakinlerinin t√ľm dengelerini alt√ľst edecek; Ege‚Äôde baŇülayan bu r√ľzg√Ęr, herkesin hayatńĪnńĪ deńüiŇütirecek b√ľy√ľk bir fńĪrtńĪnaya d√∂n√ľŇüecektir.

Afera "Mauricijus". Gde je RińĎobradi zakopao blago, ko ima milione u banci koja ne postoji i kako su Veńćernje novosti pońćele da se bave istraŇĺivańćkim novinarstvom

24 minuta sa Zoranom Kesińáem - 229. epizoda, 2. deo

snippet.title: MaraŇülńĪ 11. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
MaraŇülńĪ 11. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti:
"Operasyon yok artńĪk! MaraŇülńĪ var!"
Sami'nin adamlarńĪ tarafńĪndan vurulan Mahur'u, MaraŇülńĪ hastaneye yetiŇütirir, Mahur hemen ameliyata alńĪnńĪr. Haberi alan Aziz, Firuzan ve ńįlhan hastaneye koŇüarlar. T√ľm aile Mahur'u koruyamadńĪńüńĪ i√ßin MaraŇülńĪ'ya y√ľklenir. MaraŇülńĪ, kendisine kurulan bu kumpasńĪn √∂c√ľn√ľ almak i√ßin ant i√ßer. √Ėfkeli olan MaraŇülńĪ, intikamńĪnńĪ hangi yoldan alacaktńĪr? Ozan'ńĪn cesedini g√∂men ńįlhan ve DilŇüad korku i√ßindedir. BoŇüanmaya karar veren ńįlhan, DilŇüad'ńĪ evden kovmak ister. Fakat DilŇüad kolay pes etmez, ńįlhan'ńĪ tehdit eder. ńįlhan i√ßin geriye tek bir √ß√∂z√ľm kalńĪr. ńįlhan bu zor kararńĪ uygulayabilecek midir? ńįlhan'ńĪn kararńĪnńĪ √∂ńürenen Necati nasńĪl √∂nlem alacaktńĪr? Acar, ońülu Sami'yi MaraŇülńĪ'dan saklar. MaraŇülńĪ'nńĪn geleceńüinden korkan Acar √∂nlemler alsa da MaraŇülńĪ'nńĪn eline d√ľŇüer. Acar'ńĪ konuŇüturarak Sami'ye ulaŇümak isteyen MaraŇülńĪ amacńĪna ulaŇüabilecek midir? Kalan mallarńĪn yerini sadece Sami bildińüi i√ßin SavaŇü onu korumaya alńĪr. Bu durum MaraŇülńĪ ve SavaŇü'ńĪ karŇüńĪ karŇüńĪya getirir. SavaŇü'ńĪn adamlarńĪ MaraŇülńĪ'nńĪn evini tarar. SavaŇü, MaraŇülńĪ'yńĪ Sami'nin peŇüini bńĪrakmasńĪ i√ßin tehdit eder. MaraŇülńĪ, Sami'yi √∂ld√ľrmek i√ßin, SavaŇü da Sami'yi yaŇüatmak i√ßin b√ľy√ľk bir √ßatńĪŇümaya girer. Bu √ßatńĪŇüma kayńĪplara neden olacaktńĪr.

en.title: MaraŇülńĪ Episode 11
en.description:
MaraŇülńĪ Episode 11 - Summary:
"There is no operation anymore! There is MaraŇülńĪ!"
After being shot by Sami's men, MaraŇülńĪ rushes Mahur to the hospital, and Mahur is immediately taken to surgery. Upon receiving the news, Aziz, Firuzan, and ńįlhan rush to the hospital. The whole family blames MaraŇülńĪ for not being able to protect Mahur. MaraŇülńĪ swears to avenge the trap set up for him. How will MaraŇülńĪ take his revenge? ńįlhan and DilŇüad, who have buried Ozan's body, are in fear. Deciding to divorce, ńįlhan wants to kick DilŇüad out of the house. But DilŇüad does not give up easily and threatens ńįlhan. There is only one solution for ńįlhan. Will ńįlhan be able to implement this difficult decision? Having learned about ńįlhan's decision, what precautions will Necati take? Acar hides his son, Sami, from MaraŇülńĪ. Fearing MaraŇülńĪ to come, Acar falls into the hands of MaraŇülńĪ, even though he takes precautions. Will MaraŇülńĪ, who wants to reach Sami by making Acar talk, reach his goal? Since only Sami knows where the remaining goods are, SavaŇü takes him under protection. This situation pits MaraŇülńĪ and SavaŇü against each other. SavaŇü's men rake MaraŇülńĪ's house. SavaŇü threatens MaraŇülńĪ to let Sami go. MaraŇülńĪ, who wants to kill Sami, goes into combat with SavaŇü, who wants to keep him alive. This conflict will cause losses.

To Subscribe to YouTube Channel of MaraŇülńĪ: https://rb.gy/shb5tt

snippet.description:
Head to http://bit.ly/-Spring-Event to check out a load of all-new carwow Spring Deals! Be quick though - they‚Äôre only there until March 31st! 
.............................................................

In the mood for a hot hatch drag race? Of course you are! 

The Honda Civic Type R is one of the most popular hot hatches on the planet. From either the front or the back, it‚Äôs instantly recognisable as a Type R! Once you take a closer look, you‚Äôll find a 2-litre 4 cylinder turbocharged petrol engine under the bonnet, which will deliver 320hp and 400Nm. 

So looks and performance are all good - but what chance does it stand against the new Golf R over the quarter-mile? Just like the Type R, the Golf is powered by a 2-litre 4 cylinder turbocharged petrol to deliver 320hp. However, the Golf R can deliver slightly more torque, coming in at 420Nm. But that‚Äôs not all! While the Type R is just FWD and a manual, the VW has AWD as well as launch control! 

Does the Honda stand a chance? You‚Äôll have to keep watching to find out!
